options.content:
# Security SIEM Overview
Vue de detection et triage pour les evenements sensibles exposes par le gateway et le token manager.

- Les cartes du haut servent au triage immediat
- Les courbes montrent les vagues d'activite suspecte
- Les tableaux et logs du bas servent a identifier les IP ou utilisateurs a investiguer

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (source_ip) (count_over_time({service=~"rate-limiter-service|token-manager-service", limit_reached="true"} | json logger="logger", source_ip="context.source_ip" | logger=~"aidetector\\..*" | source_ip=~".+"[15m])))

topk(10, sum by (user_id) (count_over_time({service=~"rate-limiter-service|token-manager-service", status=~"FAILED|RATE_LIMIT_REACHED"} | json logger="logger", user_id="context.user_id" | logger=~"aidetector\\..*" | user_id=~".+"[15m])))

{service=~"rate-limiter-service|token-manager-service", level=~"WARN|ERROR"} | json service="service", logger="logger", level="level", event_type="context.event_type", status="context.status", source_ip="context.source_ip", user_id="context.user_id", message="message" | logger=~"aidetector\\..*" | line_format "[{{.service}}] [{{.level}}] [{{.event_type}}] [status={{.status}}] [ip={{.source_ip}}] [user={{.user_id}}] {{.message}}"
